scripts.dev: set -a && [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; set +a && PORT=${API_PORT:-3002} concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "bun --watch api/src/server.ts" "cd web && VITE_PORT=${VITE_PORT:-5174} API_PORT=${API_PORT:-3002} bun run dev"
scripts.serve: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "bun --watch api/src/server.ts" "cd web && bun run dev"
